---
title: "2026 Spring Econometrics TA Session"
author: "Danny Po-Hsien Kang"
date: "2026-02-24"
---

Welcome! Use the sidebar to open weekly **Slides**, **Practices** and **Answers**

Answers to the practice will be published after each TA Session.

**Sending email**: r13323002\@ntu.edu.tw (mail title including \[Econometrics TA\]) \
**TA Office hours**: Tuesday, 3:30-4:20 p.m. at SSB. (社會科學院) Room 645.

[2025 Fall Statistics TA Session Website](https://danny2915.github.io/2025StatTASession/index.html)

[OpenIntro Website](https://www.openintro.org/data/)

![](welcome.gif){width="960" fig-align="center" fig-alt="Animated welcome"}
